title: TestRunReport
description: Structured results a repo's [pipelines.test] script must write to its first declared `artifacts` path. Consumed by Coverage Audit (CV6) and Implementation Audit (I8). Canonical Rust definition: crates/schemas/src/test_run.rs.

coverage_percent.description: Overall coverage percentage (0-100), or null/omitted if the script doesn't measure coverage.

name.description: The failing test's identifying name, e.g. a fully-qualified test path. Becomes the audit finding's `location` and the fix-plan's step target.

message.description: Human-readable failure detail (assertion message, panic text). Optional - defaults to empty string.
